title: Humboltia trulla
taxonomy: Humboldtia trulla is a species of plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia and belongs to the genus Humboldtia. The classification of Humboldtia trulla is as follows: kingdom Plantae, phylum Angiospermophyta, class Magnoliopsida, order Gentianales, family Apocynaceae, genus Humboldtia, and species H. trulla.
